rules.description: Deny requests that embed credentials in URL query parameters — use Authorization header instead
rules.message: Credentials in URL query parameters are not allowed. Use the Authorization header instead.

rules.description: DELETE on user or account resources requires approval
rules.message: DELETE on user/account resources requires explicit approval — this may be irreversible.

rules.description: POST to payment endpoints requires approval — financial write operation
rules.message: POST to payment endpoint requires approval. Verify amount and recipient.

rules.description: DELETE on payment endpoints is irreversible — always require approval
rules.message: DELETE on payment endpoint is irreversible and requires explicit approval.

rules.description: PUT/PATCH on payment endpoints requires dry-run review
rules.message: Modifying payment records requires dry-run review.

rules.description: Bulk operations with more than 100 items require approval
rules.message: Bulk operations with >100 items require explicit approval.

rules.description: Any bulk operation requires dry-run to review scope
rules.message: Bulk operations require dry-run review before execution.

rules.description: Write operations on admin endpoints require dry-run
rules.message: Admin endpoint write operations require dry-run review.

rules.description: Write operations on auth endpoints (token creation, session management) require dry-run
rules.message: Auth endpoint write operations may have wide blast radius — dry-run required.

rules.description: All DELETE operations require dry-run to confirm target
PUT and PATCH operations on non-trivial resources require dry-run
rules.message: Modification operations require dry-run to verify scope.

rules.description: POST to standard (non-payment, non-auth, non-admin) endpoints is allowed after dry-run
rules.message: POST to standard endpoint requires dry-run check.
